source_pr.title: test: fix potential data race in mpp mock test
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #xxx <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

MPP mock test may hit data race issue
### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:

How it Works:

add lock to avoid data race issue
### Related changes

- PR to update `pingcap/docs`/`pingcap/docs-cn`:
- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)


Side effects


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

symptoms: Potential Go data race in mock MPP handler due to concurrent access to `MPPTaskHandler.TunnelSet` (map).
failure_signature: WARNING: DATA RACE: concurrent access to `MPPTaskHandler.TunnelSet` in store/mockstore/unistore/cophandler/mpp.go
root_cause_explanation: The mock MPP handler keeps `MPPTaskHandler.TunnelSet` as a map that can be read in `HandleEstablishConn` while being written in `registerTunnel`. Unprotected concurrent map access can trigger Go data races and make MPP mock tests flaky (especially under `-race`). This PR fixes it by introducing a mutex (`tunnelSetLock`) and locking around `TunnelSet` reads/writes.
fix_pattern: Add a mutex to protect concurrent reads/writes of `MPPTaskHandler.TunnelSet` in the mock MPP handler.

evidence: evidence: PR title: test: fix potential data race in mpp mock test
evidence: add mutex around TunnelSet map access to avoid data race in mock MPP handler (store/mockstore/unistore/cophandler/mpp.go)
